verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence from all agents. The linguistic evidence ('Foued', bilingual signage), regulatory evidence (yellow taxis, right-hand traffic), and meta evidence (architecture, poles) all strongly pointed to Tunisia. The judge correctly identified the convergence of these signals and made the correct final prediction.
